unresolved: pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/routes/service.go:Service.getImportedRoute was flagged by change-impact as a caller of Service.GetManagedRoute, but manual inspection shows it actually calls the unrelated zero-arg ImportedConfigRevision.GetManagedRoute() (legacy_storage/imported.go) — likely a name-collision false positive in the tool's caller resolution, since multiple unrelated types (ConfigRevision, ImportedConfigRevision, Service) all define a method named GetManagedRoute. Included per instructions to relay tool output directly, but it may not actually need changing.
